meta.title: Michael Horowitz on Recent Developments in the Chen Guangcheng Case
meta.description: Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Michael Horowitz testifies before the Congressional-Executive Commission on China on Thursday, May 3, 2012. The topic of his testimony was: Recent Developments and History of the Chen Guangcheng Case.
